description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-suite that runs on every push to master and develop branches, excluding docs directory changes, and on pull requests to those branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.9 and 3.10, and databases sqlite3, postgresql, and mysql. Install dependencies, run tests with coverage, and upload results to Coveralls and Codacy. Also, set up and push Docker images for specific conditions.
